query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN p.value LIKE '%billion%' OR p.value LIKE '%bn%' THEN 'Billion+'
    WHEN p.value LIKE '%million%' OR p.value LIKE '%M %' OR p.value LIKE '%M"' OR p.value LIKE '%$%M' THEN 'Millions'
    WHEN p.value IN ('Unknown', 'Undisclosed', '') OR p.value IS NULL OR p.value LIKE '%unknown%' OR p.value LIKE '%undisclosed%' OR p.value LIKE '%confidential%' THEN 'Unknown/Undisclosed'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as valueCategory,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1
GROUP BY valueCategory;

    WHEN p.value LIKE '%billion%' OR p.value LIKE '%bn%' THEN 'Billion+'
    WHEN p.value LIKE '%million%' OR p.value LIKE '%M %' OR p.value LIKE '%M"' OR p.value LIKE '%$%M' THEN 'Millions'
    WHEN p.value IN ('Unknown', 'Undisclosed', '') OR p.value IS NULL OR p.value LIKE '%unknown%' OR p.value LIKE '%undisclosed%' OR p.value LIKE '%confidential%' THEN 'Unknown/Undisclosed'
    ELSE 'Other'
  END as valueCategory,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1
GROUP BY valueCategory;
